metadata.method_name: M2' Safety-Relevant Absorption-Structured Downstream Win (or Honest-Null) vs u_sub
metadata.description: Build safety identity slices inline (religion/race/orientation/nationality via civil_comments gazetteer + content-flip templates); run a $0 recall-hole + firing-Jaccard absorption screen on the frozen Gemma-Scope L12/16k JumpReLU SAE; CONDITIONALLY run KG-named single-absorber ablation vs u_sub=diff-of-means(target, SIBLINGS) at matched forget on a joint retain-utility x fluency LLM judge. Georgia/Jordan are an end-to-end positive control. NO_SAFETY_ABSORPTION is the publishable capping limitation.
